BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: Association of Community Action Partnerships of Louisiana

SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description1Txt: ROMA Training, Equal Opportunity Training, Board Training, Annual Reporting, Workplace Safety, Weatherization Assistance Program/LiHEAP Program, Head Start CLE, Organizational Standards
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description2Txt: ROMA Training Workshop, Organizational Standards, Board Training, Fiscal Workshop, Customer Service

GrantOrContributionPdDurYrGrp.GrantOrContributionPurposeTxt: Donation to help victims affected by Hurricane Irma
Donation to assist victims affected by Hurricane Harvey
Donation to assist victims affected by Hurricane Maria

RlnOfActyToAccomOfExmptPrpsGrp.RelationshipStatementTxt: Each activity contributes to helping low-income individuals and families achieve economic self-sufficiency and stability.
Member organizations pay dues to contribute to program expenses incurred throughout the year.
Allows organization to host conference to train employers on Equal Opportunity requirements.

CashDeemedCharitableExplnStmt.ShortExplanationTxt: All cash deemed held for charitable activities.

CashDistributionExplnStmt.ExplanationTxt: Cash reserved to pay prior year's program related debts to accomplish charitable purposes of the organization & meet suitability test and cash distribution test.

ExplnOfNonFilingWithAGStmt.ExplanationTxt: The foundation will furnish a copy of Form 990-PF to the Attorney General (or designate) of Louisiana by the due date of the tax return including filing extensions.
